title: Bagelium
description: Bagelium add some visual improvements, generation improvements and some mechanical additions.
body:
**Bagelium** was inspired by friends who like the origin's mod and my insisntant stupidity.

as me and my friends were hanging out one day wandering around a public server we felt: "what if we go play modded some day?" and like the clinically insane nut job i am, i took it to heart and slapped together some mods that i use sometimes as modpacks i found didnt fit what to my understanding we were looking for and adjusted it to fit with less powerful machines.

also i was very hungry when making this so theres a few delights mods.

changes some of the ambient visuals and sound making the game more visually pleasing
changing the generation adding cool furniture to build with and machinery.

changing the players experience with just playing the game with the origins mod making your player have cool and custom abilities.

either to make the game easier or  harder but still making game play more interesting combined with the visual changes and generation.

some mods included are: create, delight's, origins, essential. and generation by stardust labs and yung's mods
 

Hope you enjoy playing this great game!
